title: viola × insolita
intro: Viola × insolita, also known as the hybrid pansy viola, is a cross between the garden pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the common blue violet (Viola sororia). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Viola × insolita include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Viola × insolita can be consumed as a tea, used in salves and ointments, or taken as a supplement, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
